title: Bridge Essay: Abnormal Effective Connectivity in the Brain is Involved in Auditory Verbal Hall

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — inner speech, mantra meditation, semantic cognition, focused attention.

**Abnormal Effective Connectivity in the Brain is Involved in Auditory Verbal Hallucinations in Schizophrenia.**. Neurosci Bull.. PMID: 28224285. DOI: 10.1007/s12264-017-0101-x. Information flow among auditory and language processing-related regions implicated in the pathophysiology of auditory verbal hallucinations (AVHs) in schizophrenia (SZ) remains unclear.
